full_text:
Shi Xie (Weiyan) 士燮 (威彥)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Shi Xie (士燮), styledWeiyan (威彥), was born in Guang Xin of the Cang Wu Commandery. Grand Administrator of Jiaozhi. Paid regular tribute to Sun Quan. Shi Xie was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Shi Xie lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
